description_long: This is a modern tactical shotgun with a robust, angular design and a combination of matte black and metallic yellow finishes. The main body features a prominent cylindrical magazine tube beneath the barrel, accented with red highlights and venting details. The stock is a skeletal, folding type with a yellow finish, providing both lightweight construction and structural support. The grip is ergonomic, with a pistol-style handle and visible trigger guard, while the upper receiver includes a rail system for mounting optics or accessories. The overall build suggests a focus on durability and urban tactical use, with reinforced components and a visually striking color scheme.
description: A modern tactical shotgun with a black and yellow finish, featuring a cylindrical magazine, folding stock, and ergonomic grip. The design is robust and suited for urban tactical scenarios.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, yellow folding stock, cylindrical magazine, and detailed rail system.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening, muzzle, and the alignment of the magazine tube beneath the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the folding stock, grip, and the red-accented magazine tube.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's structure, grip, and the back of the receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with vented ribbing and a cylindrical magazine tube beneath
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
